chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1019 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 4237/25 2.For orders on CMA 4238/25 3.For hearing of main case 17-12-2025 Mr. Asif Ali Rajput Bhatti, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the material available on record. From perusal of the impugned order dated 18.06.2025, passed by the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur, in Misc. Application No.08 of 2025 (re: Muhammad Ali Shah v. Province of Sindh and others), it reflects that only directions were issued to serve notices under Section 3 of the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act, 2010 upon the encroachers and thereafter to take action in accordance with law. We observe that the impugned order is in consonance with law and no illegality has been pointed out therein. However, learned counsel for the petitioner only submits that certain observations have been made against the petitioner. Under the circumstances, this petition, along with the listed application(s), is disposed of with the directions to the Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Rohri, to follow the impugned order in respect of paragraph No.09 thereof. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
